name: INTERNATIONAL PAPER CO /NEW/
business: International Paper Company produces renewable fiber-based packaging products. It manufactures a broad range of containerboard and corrugated packaging used to protect, ship, and display goods. The company operates in North America, Latin America, Europe, and North Africa.

exposures.sentence: We produce renewable fiber-based packaging solutions, primarily servicing industrial consumer goods and e-commerce markets.
customers in industries such as food and beverage, agriculture, industrial manufacturing, personal care pharmaceuticals and consumer goods.
customers in industries such as food and beverage, agriculture, industrial manufacturing, personal care pharmaceuticals and consumer goods.

Raw materials essential to our businesses include wood fiber, mainly purchased in the form of pulpwood, wood chips and old corrugated containers ("OCC"), and certain chemicals, including caustic soda, starch and adhesives.
We use carbon-neutral biomass and manufacturing residuals to generate a majority of the manufacturing energy at our mills.

catalysts.event: Separation into two independent publicly traded companies in North America and EMEA
catalysts.sentence: Planning to separate into two independent, publicly traded companies in North America and EMEA (announced Jan 2026)
Investing in greenfield packaging facilities; plans for two new plants announced in 2025
